title: Pour Femme 100ml EDT – Elegant Women's Fragrance with Soft Floral & Musk Notes

amazon_product_details_section.Delivery information: : We cannot deliver certain products outside mainland UK ( Details). We will only be able to confirm if this product can be delivered to your chosen address when you enter your delivery address at checkout.

features: 🌸 Fresh & Feminine Fragrance – Immerse yourself in a beautifully layered scent that captures the essence of elegance and charm. This exquisite blend opens with crisp neroli and romantic rose.

💖 Long-Lasting Scent – Enjoy all-day freshness with a scent that stays with you from morning to night. The warm, comforting base of creamy vanilla and soft white musk creates a subtle yet memorable trail that lingers gently on the skin.

🎁 Perfect Gift for Her – Delight someone special with a fragrance that speaks of elegance, warmth, and charm. Ideal for birthdays, holidays, anniversaries, or just because, this beautifully packaged eau de toilette makes a thoughtful gift she’ll truly appreciate.

💃 Everyday Elegance – Designed to complement every moment, this fragrance strikes the perfect balance between freshness and sophistication. Its light floral and fruity notes make it ideal for daytime wear—whether at the office, running errands.

💸 Affordable Luxury – Experience the luxury of a high-end fragrance without the hefty price tag. This eau de toilette offers a premium scent profile, crafted with quality ingredients, all while remaining budget-friendly.
description: Product description Elevate your fragrance collection with My Muse Pour Femme Eau de Toilette – a beautifully balanced perfume that captures the spirit of femininity. Housed in a sleek 100ml bottle, this eau de toilette offers a fresh, floral, and subtly sweet scent that lingers throughout the day 🌼. 🌿 A Symphony of Fragrance Notes Let your senses unfold through a layered scent journey: ✨ Top Notes – Neroli & Rose: Crisp, light, and elegantly floral 🍊 Heart Notes – Blackcurrant & Green Mandarin: Sweet yet zesty with a hint of playful sophistication 🍦 Base Notes – Vanilla & White Musk: Warm, smooth, and comforting, leaving a delicate trail 💐 Perfect for Every Moment Whether you're heading to work, out for brunch, or enjoying a romantic evening, this fragrance adapts effortlessly to any occasion. Its gentle yet distinctive aroma adds a touch of class to both daytime and evening wear 🕯️🌞. 🎁 A Thoughtful Gift Idea Looking for the perfect present? My Muse Pour Femme makes a charming gift for birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, or "just because" moments 💝. With its luxurious scent and elegant presentation, it’s sure to impress. 💸 Affordable Luxury Enjoy the allure of a high-end fragrance without the premium price. This EDT proves that sophistication doesn't have to come at a cost 💷. 💃 For the Modern Woman Confident, graceful, and inspiring – this scent is designed for women who express themselves through elegance and charm. Make My Muse Pour Femme your everyday signature fragrance 🌟. Directions adults 18 years and older Safety Warning A warming and delicately feminine fragrance that would make a great gift for that special someone. See more
